name: Venomous Crystal
description: A carved snake coils around much of this weapon, its body tensed to strike. When activated, a venomous weapon coats itself in injury poison (Fort DC 14, 1d4 Str/1d4 Str), which lasts for 1 minute or until your next successful attack with the weapon, whichever comes first. A venomous weapon functions three times per day. Projectile weapons bestow this property on their ammunition.
